title: P27 real roadmap audit
objective:
Run script:
"""
state_dir = Path('governance/state')
report_dir = Path('governance/reports')
queue_path = Path('governance/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue_path.exists() else {'tasks': []}
recent_ids = ['P14','KZ-1','KZ-1B','KZ-2','KZ-3','KZ-4','P15','P15B','P15C','P16','P16B','P17','P17B','P18','P18B','P19','P19B','P19C','P19D','P20','P20B','P21','P21B','P22','P22B','P23','P23B','P24','P24B','P25','P25B','P26','P26B']
state_files = [str(p) for p in state_dir.glob('*.json')]
report_files = [str(p) for p in report_dir.glob('*.md')]
coverage = []
for rid in recent_ids:
    token = rid.replace('-', '').upper()
    has_state = any(token in Path(p).name.replace('-', '').upper() for p in state_files)
    has_report = any(token in Path(p).name.replace('-', '').upper() for p in report_files)
    coverage.append({'id': rid, 'state': has_state, 'report': has_report})
missing = [x for x in coverage if not x['state'] or not x['report']]
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'P26B':
        task['status'] = 'DONE_PENDING_SHA_RECORD'
    if task.get('id') == 'P27':
        task['status'] = 'IN_PROGRESS'
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:16:00Z'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
state = Path('governance/state/P27_REAL_ROADMAP_EXECUTION_AUDIT.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'P27','trace_id':'p27_real_roadmap_execution_audit','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'checked_ids':recent_ids,'coverage':coverage,'missing_or_incomplete':missing,'active_queue_task_count':len(queue.get('tasks', [])),'workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'P27B record P27 result in ACTIVE_QUEUE and execution_log'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/P27_REAL_ROADMAP_EXECUTION_AUDIT.md')
report.write_text('# P27 | Real roadmap execution audit\nStatus: completed\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\n## Scope\nChecked recent P/KZ chain for state/report parity and ACTIVE_QUEUE status.\n\n## Missing or incomplete\n' + json.dumps(missing, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n\n## Queue tasks\n' + json.dumps(queue.get('tasks', []), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n\nWorkflow lock respected; no .github/workflows files touched.\n\nNext: P27B record P27 result in ACTIVE_QUEUE and execution_log.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
"""No issue comments.
